quotes.text: 能上985就别去211，能上211就别去双非。学校层次就是你的第一张名片。
quotes.text_en: If you can get into a 985, don't go to a 211. If you can get into a 211, don't go to a non-key university. Your school tier is your first business card.
quotes.context: 强调学校层次对就业的决定性影响

quotes.text: 兰州大学，985中的隐藏王者，性价比极高，分数低但实力强。
quotes.text_en: Lanzhou University — a hidden champion among 985 schools. Extremely cost-effective: low admission scores but strong capabilities.

quotes.text: 哈工大威海，985的牌子、二线的分数，工科生的宝藏学校。
quotes.text_en: Harbin Institute of Technology Weihai — a 985 brand at tier-two scores. A treasure school for engineering students.
quotes.context: 推荐性价比高的985分校区

quotes.text: 东北大学，虽然地理位置吃亏，但自动化、计算机在全国都是顶级的。
quotes.text_en: Northeastern University — location is a disadvantage, but its automation and CS programs are top-tier nationally.
quotes.context: 推荐东北大学的优势学科

quotes.text: 西北农林科技大学，985中分数最低的，但进去就是985的学历，考研、考公都好使。
quotes.text_en: Northwest A&F University has the lowest 985 admission scores, but once in, you have a 985 degree — great for grad school and civil service exams.
quotes.context: 推荐分数线最低的985学校

quotes.text: 中国海洋大学，985里面最容易被忽略的，海洋科学全国第一。
quotes.text_en: Ocean University of China — the most overlooked among 985 schools, with the nation's top marine science program.

quotes.text: 上海大学，211里面的王者。在上海就是最大的优势，实习、就业机会碾压外省985。
quotes.text_en: Shanghai University — a king among 211 schools. Being in Shanghai is the biggest advantage: internship and job opportunities crush 985s in other provinces.
quotes.context: 推荐地理位置优越的211院校

quotes.text: 南京理工、南京航空，军工背景的211，就业率高得吓人。
quotes.text_en: Nanjing University of Science and Technology, Nanjing University of Aeronautics — 211s with military-industrial backgrounds and frighteningly high employment rates.

quotes.text: 合肥工业大学，低调到没人知道，但工科就业杠杠的。中建、中铁每年招一大批。
quotes.text_en: Hefei University of Technology — so low-key nobody knows it, but engineering employment is stellar. China Construction and China Railway recruit a huge batch every year.

quotes.text: 苏州大学，211里面进步最快的，地处苏州，产业发达，不愁就业。
quotes.text_en: Soochow University — the fastest-rising among 211s, located in Suzhou with developed industries. No worries about employment.

quotes.text: 宁去大城市的211，不去小城市的985。城市决定了你的眼界、实习和第一份工作。
quotes.text_en: Better a 211 in a big city than a 985 in a small town. The city determines your horizons, internships, and first job.
quotes.context: 城市优先于学校层次的观点

quotes.text: 双一流不等于老985/211。有些新入选的双一流，社会认可度还没跟上来。
quotes.text_en: Double First-Class doesn't equal the old 985/211. Some newly selected schools haven't earned social recognition yet.
quotes.context: 区分双一流和传统985/211的认可度

quotes.text: 选学校也要看它的王牌专业。去了好学校但读了个烂专业，不如去差一档的学校读王牌专业。
quotes.text_en: When choosing a school, look at its flagship programs. A bad major at a great school might be worse than a flagship program at a slightly lower-ranked school.
quotes.context: 强调学校与专业的组合匹配

quotes.text: 能去省会就别去地级市。省会的资源、机会、人脉，地级市给不了你。
quotes.text_en: If you can go to a provincial capital, don't go to a prefectural city. Resources, opportunities, and connections there are beyond what smaller cities can offer.
quotes.context: 强调省会城市的资源优势

quotes.text: 独立学院和民办大学，能不去就不去。学费贵、社会认可低，出来找工作被歧视。
quotes.text_en: Independent colleges and private universities — avoid if you can. Expensive tuition, low social recognition, and job discrimination after graduation.
quotes.context: 警告考生慎选独立学院和民办高校

quotes.text: 好的高职比烂三本强。深圳职业技术大学、金华职业技术学院，就业率比很多本科都高。
quotes.text_en: Good vocational colleges beat bad third-tier universities. Shenzhen Polytechnic and Jinhua Polytechnic have higher employment rates than many regular universities.
